name: tencent-csip
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Cloud Security Center read-only APIs.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeAlertL.name: describe-alert-list
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeAlertL.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP alert list.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCVMAss.name: describe-cvm-assets
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCVMAss.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP CVM assets.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribePublic.name: describe-public-ip-assets
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribePublic.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP public IP assets.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeVpcAss.name: describe-vpc-assets
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeVpcAss.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP VPC assets.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.name: describe-risk-center-vul-risks
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP vulnerability risks.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.name: describe-risk-center-weak-password-risks
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP weak password risks.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.name: describe-risk-center-config-risks
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP configuration risks.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.name: describe-risk-center-port-risks
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeRiskCe.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP port risks.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCSIPRi.name: describe-csip-risk-statistics
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCSIPRi.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP risk statistics.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeAccess.name: describe-access-key-risk
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeAccess.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP access key risks.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCosAla.name: describe-cos-alarm-list
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeCosAla.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP COS alarms.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeSkillS.name: describe-skill-scan-result
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeSkillS.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP skill scan result.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeOrgani.name: describe-organization-user-info
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeOrgani.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP organization users.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeSubUse.name: describe-sub-user-info
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/DescribeSubUse.description: Query Tencent Cloud CSIP sub users.

Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/InvokeReadOnly.name: invoke-read-only-action
Tencent_CSIP.Tencent_CSIP/InvokeReadOnly.description: Invoke an allowed Tencent Cloud CSIP Describe* action.
